utterances.text: Daniel, Hana, thanks for making the time. I want to use this hour to understand where you stand on renewal and what we can do to address the concerns you raised.
Honest answer: we're not in a great place. The SSO migration in February took two full days of business interruption, and our exec team is still asking why we didn't have an SLA on identity issues.
And we still don't have an admin audit log UI. Our security team has been asking for it for six months, and right now we maintain a separate spreadsheet to track admin changes.
Both are fair points. On SSO, we've added the proactive Okta health check and you have a dedicated escalation line. On audit log UI, it is on the roadmap and I can connect you with the PM.
Roadmap is good but our procurement won't sign a multi-year renewal on a promise. We need a written commitment with a target quarter.
Let me take that back. The audit log UI is currently scoped for late this year, and I'll see if I can get a target quarter written into the renewal terms.
There is also adoption. Out of our hundred and eighty users, only about ninety are active weekly. We expected closer to a hundred and forty by now.
I looked at the report this morning. The gap is concentrated in the EMEA team. We can run a re-enablement program for the inactive cohort and check in weekly for the next quarter.
Re-enablement helps but the underlying issue is that our reps say the workflow is slower than the previous tool for short outreach. They drop back to email.
I'd like to bring our product team in to listen to that feedback directly. The AI Workflow update from March cuts the number of clicks for short outreach significantly — we can demo it next week.
We're open to a demo. But to be clear, if we don't see the audit log UI commitment and a measurable improvement in adoption in the next ninety days, we will go to market.
I hear you. Let me put together a written success plan with the audit log commitment, the re-enablement program, and the demo. I will send it by Friday.
Friday works. We will review it internally and reply early next week.
Thank you both for the candour, it really helps me focus on the right things.
